title: potentilla fragaria subsp. micrantha
intro: Potentilla fragaria subsp. micrantha, also known as Dwarf Cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Potentilla fragaria subsp. micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual needs.
